mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that reduces discount rates for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns in periods of FEDFUNDS decline are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 200 in CPIAUCSL triggers central bank rate hikes, increasing equity discount rates and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns remain positive despite CPIAUCSL > 200 or Rank IC > 0.05 in inflationary regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and GDP (GDPC1) signals robust supply-side expansion, boosting corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are not significantly positive when both INDPRO and GDPC1 show growth or Rank IC < 0.03 in expansionary regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production (INDPRO) during high energy prices compresses margins, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive when INDPRO > 110 and CPIAUCSL > 200 or Rank IC > 0.05 in such regimes.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening labor market (UNRATE < 4.5%) drives wage inflation, increasing corporate costs and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are positive when UNRATE < 4.5% or Rank IC < 0.03 in tight labor regimes.

mechanism_narrative: High federal funds rates (FEDFUNDS > 4.5%) signal monetary tightening, increasing borrowing costs and causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5d returns are positive when FEDFUNDS > 4.5% or Rank IC > 0.05 in tightening regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts (HOUST > 2000) indicate resilient demand, boosting consumer confidence and generating positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d returns are not positive when HOUST > 2000 or Rank IC < 0.03 in demand-driven regimes.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in payroll employment (PAYEMS) and consumer spending (RSAFS) signals strong demand, driving corporate revenues and positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20d returns are not significantly positive when both PAYEMS and RSAFS grow or Rank IC < 0.03 in expansionary regimes.
